# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

$templatesDir = __DIR__ . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'templates';
$defaultPage  = 'home';
$paramName    = 'page';

$page = $_GET[$paramName] ?? $defaultPage;
$page = is_string($page) ? $page : $defaultPage;

// sanitize to a safe slug/path
$page = trim($page);
$page = str_replace(["\0", "\r", "\n"], '', $page);
$page = preg_replace('~[\\\\]+~', '/', $page);
$page = preg_replace('~\.\.+~', '.', $page);
$page = trim($page, "/ \t");

// allow nested templates like "blog/post", but only safe characters
if ($page === '' || !preg_match('~^[a-zA-Z0-9/_-]+$~', $page)) {
    $page = $defaultPage;
}

$base = realpath($templatesDir);
if ($base === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    exit('Templates directory missing.');
}

$file = $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . str_replace('/', DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR, $page) . '.php';
$real = realpath($file);

// ensure file exists, is within templates directory, and is a php file
if ($real === false || strpos($real, $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0 || pathinfo($real, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) !== 'php') {
    $file404 = $base . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
    if (is_file($file404)) {
        http_response_code(404);
        include $file404;
        exit;
    }
    http_response_code(404);
    exit('Page not found.');
}

include $real;
